description: Brier score (multi-class, lower better) and top-label ECE (n_bins=10, lower better) for the P3 champion (19-class) and the P6 coarse BASELINE (4-class, S3) -- both use plain Platt-scaled SVC(probability=True), no CalibratedClassifierCV. Varian E (P6 ablation, WITH CalibratedClassifierCV) is cited for context only, not recomputed.

p6_variant_e_cited_for_context.source: P7_CoarseAblation_Phase1_report.md, Varian E calibration quality table, S3 row
